title: Barpeta Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Barpeta with a Z-Score of +3.40. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Barpeta are extreme, with a heat wave warning issued due to the abnormally high temperatures.
The temperature is significantly higher than the average, causing discomfort to the residents, with a relative humidity of 72% and wind speed of 5.5 km/h.
The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Barpeta's residents and infrastructure.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
